reviews.review_title: are you going to add multiplayer
reviews.review_description: this is what i'm hoping for can you please make it happen
Secret code is 0730 pls tell where put

reviews.review_title: BRO THIS GAME WAS SO FUN
reviews.review_description:
I was scared at first, but once I got jump, scared it was not that bad so I got some friends to join. I got one friend to join but he got tired of it and one of my other friends was online so I asked him and he said yes And there was this other guy that joined that wasn’t my friend my friend and the other guy we’re having so much fun playing with the rake so much stuff happened until my friend oculus died I think and then that other guy I met was so kind so I friended him. I love the Roblox music. This game is absolutely a MASTERPIECE and it even got me a new friend five stars 🔥
￼￼￼
This game is awesome and scary. And this is so good that I actually bought a pack in it. If the owner of the game ever reads this don't give up 👍

developer_response.body: Heyy thank you for your support !

reviews.review_description: This is probably one of the best horror games I've played for free I don't know why no one plays this the character models are okay but other than that this game's of five out five
Me and my friend played this, and it's scary as ****. One of the best horror games I've ever played
the game is peak but theres no shop to spend my scrap so a 4

Player models: 8.5/10

Monster: 7.5/10

Movement: 8/10

Gameplay: I haven’t played the game enough lol.

This game is way too underrated
I'm surprised that barely anyone plays this it's really good

developer_response.body: Hey, thank you, we are not too sure how to increase the player count but we greatly appreciate the review
